# GitHub Discussions categories

Enable [GitHub Discussions](https://docs.github.com/en/discussions) for this
repository and create the following categories. Discussions are the recommended
place for questions and community conversation, keeping issues focused on bugs
and actionable feature requests.

| Category           | Format       | Description                                                        |
| ------------------ | ------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 📣 Announcements   | Announcement | Official release notes and news from the maintainers.             |
| 💬 General         | Open         | Anything about the SDK that doesn't fit another category.          |
| ❓ Q&A             | Question     | Ask usage questions and get answers from the community.            |
| 💡 Ideas           | Open         | Propose and discuss ideas before opening a feature request.        |
| 🛠️ Show and tell   | Open         | Share what you built with MailerMine.                             |
| 🐛 Help / Troubleshooting | Question | Get help diagnosing problems that may not be bugs.            |

## How to enable

1. Go to **Settings → General → Features** and enable **Discussions**.
2. Open the **Discussions** tab and edit categories to match the table above.
3. Update the issue template `config.yml` link if your discussions URL differs.
